positive: A maximalist, illustrative pattern featuring interlocking stylized crescent moons, glowing bioluminescent flora, and delicate geometric celestial structures. The design must be centered and highly symmetrical, utilizing a limited, high-contrast palette of deep indigo, electric teal, pearlescent gold, and matte cream. Style should be a mix of Art Nouveau curvature and modern linocut negative space. Composition must emphasize clean, distinct silhouettes and graphic impact, suitable for direct print on fabric. Detailed etching lines, illuminated by soft, dramatic halo lighting. Full view, symmetrical radial design, perfect seamless repeat.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, signature, copyright, messy, amateur, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, gradient fade, photographic, photorealism
